originalTitle: After covering Prime Day for 36 hours over four days, this is the one thing I bought
summary: We’ve covered so many deals during Prime Day that my head is spinning. But after four days of doing our damndest to try and help folks save money, the thing I’m most hyped for is a simple tool for fixing my most egregious mistakes. I bought a pair of Vampliers. If you’re unfamiliar, Vampliers are […]
content: We’ve covered so many deals during Prime Day that my head is spinning. But after four days of doing our damndest to try and help folks save money, the thing I’m most hyped for is a simple tool for fixing my most egregious mistakes. I bought a pair of Vampliers. If you’re unfamiliar, Vampliers are Japanese-made pliers designed for one simple task: removing stripped screws. I don’t even remember when I first heard of them, but I threw one on my wishlist long ago and thought, “I should get one of these eventually.” That time is now: the standard 6.25-inch VT-001 Vampliers is on sale for $25.58 (about $6 off) at Amazon. [Product: Vampire Tools VT-001 Vampliers 6.25-inch screw extractor pliers | https://www.amazon.com/VAMPLIERS-Extractor-Non-Slip-Multipurpose-Fasteners/dp/B006YJKAPQ?tag=theverge02-20, https://vampiretools.com/product/vampliers-6-25-screw-extraction-pliers/] I recommended a smaller pair of Vampliers in our roundup of Prime Day deals under $25. I knew from people I trust how handy these things are. I even read Chris Person’s excellent ode to his Engineer “Neji-Saurus” pliers, which are the same thing with a green handle. (Engineer makes both sets of pliers; Vampire Tools distributes rebranded Engineer tools in the US.) Over the years, I’ve abandoned far too many stripped screws in door jambs, junction boxes, and even under my desk. And now I finally have a means to correct my mistakes. Maybe it’s the full pot of coffee I’ve been drinking every day since Tuesday, but I’m done with Prime Day and I’m done with stripped screws.
chineseTitle: 在四天内花了 36 个小时报道 Prime Day 后，这是我买的一件东西
chineseSummary: 我们在 Prime Day 期间报道了太多优惠，让我头晕目眩。但经过四天的尽最大努力帮助人们省钱之后，我最兴奋的是一个解决我最严重错误的简单工具。我买了一双吸血鬼。如果您不熟悉，吸血鬼是[...]
chineseContent: 我们在 Prime Day 期间报道了太多优惠，让我头晕目眩。但经过四天的尽最大努力帮助人们省钱之后，我最兴奋的是一个解决我最严重错误的简单工具。我买了一双吸血鬼。如果您不熟悉，Vampliers 是一种日本制造的钳子，专为一项简单的任务而设计：卸下脱落的螺钉。我什至不记得第一次听说它们是什么时候，但我很久以前就将它们放入了我的愿望清单中，并想：“我最终应该得到其中一个。”现在是时候了：标准 6.25 英寸 VT-001 Vamplier 在亚马逊上以 25.58 美元（约优惠 6 美元）的价格出售。 【产品：Vampire Tools VT-001 Vampliers 6.25英寸螺丝拔出钳| https://www.amazon.com/VAMPLIERS-Extractor-Non-Slip-Multi Purpose-Fasteners/dp/B006YJKAPQ?tag=theverge02-20，https://vampiretools.com/product/vampliers-6-25-screw-extraction-pliers/]我在我们的 Prime Day 25 美元以下优惠汇总中推荐了一对较小的 Vamplier。我从我信任的人那里知道这些东西有多方便。我什至读了克里斯·珀森（Chris Person）对他的工程师“Neji-Saurus”钳子的精彩颂歌，这也是带有绿色手柄的东西。 （工程师生产两套钳子；吸血鬼工具在美国经销重新命名的工程师工具。）多年来，我在门框、接线盒甚至桌子底下遗弃了太多脱落的螺丝。现在我终于有办法纠正我的错误了。也许这是我从周二以来每天喝的整壶咖啡，但我已经受够了黄金日，也受够了螺丝脱落。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
